subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed, that He may guide all who dwell on earth unto the Straight Path of God and purify them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لیهدی من علی الارض الی صراط الله المستقیم و یطهرهم من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
